calendar.matters:
Motion Of Deft Helena Wong Lei Chun For Relief Fr Default And To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-12-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HELENA WONG LAI CHUN MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 473(B) BASED ON MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, SURPRISE AND EXCUSABLE NEGLECT OF DEFENDANT HELENA WONG LAI CHUN:
APPEAR: Michael Brooks Carroll, Esq. 788-7600 for pltfs & opposing parties; Ray W. Sherman, Esq. 510/452-3222 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court ruled as follows: Motion to set aside granted on condition 1)moving party does not oppose the advancing of trial date within four months 2)$50,000.00 litigation bond be posted 3)order immediate mediation, costs split by both parties 4)no lis pendens without ex-parte application/appearance. (302/AJR/MD) Court Reporter Joe Vickstein, CSR#4780
